settings.title: Delete the worst one
settings.action: Delete your single most-used app for the 7 days. Notifications off except calls & texts.

settings.title: Phone-free first hour
settings.action: Don't touch your phone for the first hour after waking. Leave it across the room overnight.

settings.title: Boredom on purpose
settings.action: Sit and do nothing for 10 minutes, no phone. Let your brain feel the quiet — this is the reset working.

settings.title: Swap one hit
settings.action: Every time you reach to scroll, do one thing off your real-dopamine menu instead. Track how many times.

settings.title: Move your body
settings.action: 20 minutes of movement — walk, gym, dance, anything. Real dopamine loves effort.

settings.title: One real connection
settings.action: Have one genuine, phone-down conversation. Call someone or meet up. Notice how good it feels.

settings.title: Design your normal
settings.action: Write the 3 rules you're keeping for good. You've felt the difference — now lock it in.
